name: context-task-planning
description: Task-scoped context engineering for recoverable, visible, and isolated long-running coding work.

interface.shortDescription: Durable planning context for long Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Keep long-running coding tasks recoverable with file-backed plans, progress logs, routing hints, and Codex lifecycle hooks.
defaultPrompt: Use Context Task Planning to start a durable plan for this multi-step coding task.
Resume the active task from local planning files before continuing.
